basics.name: Mohammed Essaddek
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer | Solution Architect | .NET Expert
basics.summary:
Welcome to my interactive terminal resume!

I am a Senior Software Engineer and Solution Architect with 10+ years of experience. Currently leading the architecture of Teal Threat Defense Platform (TTDP) — a unified OT/ICS cybersecurity portal (IEC 62443) at Teal Technology Services.

Core Expertise:
• Architecture: Clean Architecture, CQRS, Microservices, SaaS Multi-Tenant (Schema-per-tenant), Vertical Slice
• Backend: C#, .NET 10, ASP.NET Core (Minimal APIs), Entity Framework Core 9, MediatR, SignalR
• Frontend: TypeScript, Next.js 16, React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui, Auth.js, Hono.js
• AI: LLM integration (OpenAI API), RAG systems (FAISS), automated AI agents, Python (FastAPI)
• Cloud & DevOps: Azure (App Services, Blob, Functions), Docker, Nginx, GitHub Actions, Grafana, Prometheus
• Database: PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MongoDB
• Security & IAM: Zero Trust, RBAC, TLS 1.3, WebSockets hardening
• Leadership: Technical roadmaps, SFD authoring, team mentoring, Agile/Scrum

Proven track record across cybersecurity platforms, IoT tracking systems, government portals, enterprise SaaS, and HR digitalization. Passionate about clean code, observability, and continuous learning.

Based in Casablanca, Morocco | Open to remote opportunities | Fluent in French, Arabic, English

highlights: Governance & System Architecture: Defined technical vision (Next.js 16, .NET 10, Docker) and designed a modular Single-Tenant architecture ensuring strict client data isolation
Hybrid Ecosystem Integration: Transparent integration of legacy apps and secure encapsulation of third-party tools (Trellix, Veeam) via Nginx Reverse Proxy and dynamic iframes
Observability & Data Pipeline: Designed an ultra-lightweight SIEM Lite telemetry pipeline (Fluent Bit, Prometheus) for real-time log and metrics processing without OT infrastructure overhead
Security & IAM: Modeled Zero Trust policy, implemented granular RBAC with license verification engine, and hardened flows (TLS 1.3, WebSockets)
Strategic Leadership: Authored Detailed Functional Specifications (SFD), defined 60 man-day technical roadmap, and mentored the development team
work.summary: Technical urbanization and piloting of a unified OT/ICS cybersecurity portal (Single Pane of Glass) compliant with IEC 62443. Project: Teal Threat Defense Platform (TTDP). Technical environment: Micro-Services/Hybrid Architecture, .NET 10 (Clean Architecture, CQRS), Next.js 16, PostgreSQL, Docker, Fluent Bit, Prometheus, Grafana, Auth.js.

highlights: 🏗️ Modern Architecture: Designed high-performance Feature-Based architecture
🚀 DevOps & Observability: Established robust containerized infrastructure and complete monitoring stack to ensure high availability
🔒 Security & Business Logic: Implemented complex approval workflows, business day calculation engine, and advanced rights management (RBAC)
💻 User Experience: Developed responsive interface for smooth state management
work.summary: End-to-end design of a modular SaaS platform for HR process digitalization. Project: Leave Management System. Technical environment: Next.js 14, TypeScript, Hono.js, Docker, Grafana, Prometheus, Loki, Azure AD, Tailwind CSS.

highlights: 🎯 Provide technical expertise for complex projects and deliver advanced technical solutions
💰 Participate in estimating workloads and project costs
👥 Assist teams in design, development, and implementation of technical solutions
🤝 Collaborate with stakeholders to ensure compliance with technical requirements
work.summary: Ensure technical expertise, estimation, and team assistance on ongoing projects. Client: OCP. Technical environment: .NET Core, .NET Standard, C#, ASP.NET, Azure (App Services, Functions), Docker, DevOps, SQL Server, GIT.

highlights: 👥 Manage and monitor team productivity in accordance with client SLAs
🔧 Provide technical guidance to the team, including troubleshooting and problem resolution
💡 Deliver technical assistance on the technology stack (infrastructure and application)
🔗 Liaison between the team and stakeholders
work.summary: Lead the Custom Build team, ensure SLA compliance, and provide technical leadership. Client: OCP. Technical environment: .NET Core, .NET Standard, Azure, Docker, DevOps, SQL Server.

highlights: 🔗 Development of core features and seamless integration (Connection with international marketplaces)
🧪 Writing and execution of unit tests and integration tests (Pacts and Gherkin)
work.summary: Client: Cdiscount | Project: Marketplace As A Service (MAAS). Technical environment: .NET Core, .NET Standard, Azure DevOps, Docker, KafkaStream, MongoDB.

highlights: 🏗️ Implementation of application architecture in .NET Core MVC and API
💻 Application development and DevOps pipeline implementation
work.summary: Client: Moroccan Ministry of Foreign Affairs | Project: Portal rdv.consulat.ma - Spearheaded the complete modernization of Morocco's consular appointment platform (https://rdv.consulat.ma/). Technical environment: .NET Core, .NET Standard, Azure DevOps, Linux RedHat.

highlights: 🎯 Led technical architecture for Nexans TMA (.NET scope)
📡 Architected 'Connected Drums' IoT GPS tracking platform for industrial cable management
☁️ Implemented Azure IoT Hub for real-time device telemetry and management
⚡ Developed serverless solutions using Azure Functions
🔧 Built RESTful APIs with ASP.NET Web API
📊 Created Angular 5 dashboard for real-time tracking and analytics
💼 Application maintenance, requirements analysis, client support, estimation and development of new features
🔧 Responsible for Mantis and PopTs scopes, SharePoint Administration
work.summary: Client: Nexans - Served as Technical Architect and Business Analyst, responsible for the entire .NET technology stack. Led development of 'Connected Drums' IoT solution. Technical environment: Azure IoT Hub, Azure Functions, ASP.NET MVC Web API, EF, Angular 5, Azure DevOps. Also responsible for TMA Nexans projects (Mantis, PopTs, SharePoint Administration).

Project: Environmental reporting platform. Development of an Environmental Reporting Application using ASP.NET MVC 5, SQL Server 2008. Mission: Requirements analysis, Design, Application architecture setup, solution implementation.
Project: SIV for LGV ONCF - Participation in the implementation of the Passenger Information System for the National Railway Office. Technical environment: WPF, MVVM, SQL Server 2012, Telerik, TFS.
Study, Design and Implementation of a career management platform.

references.name: Yassine  AIT ELBAZ
references.reference: It is difficult to describe how impressed I was with Mohamed's work when I had the opportunity to work with him. I could not do better than to highly recommend Mohamed for his talents.

references.name: Tarik Fadli
references.reference: I hereby wish to recommend Mohammed ESSADDEK. Having had the opportunity to supervise Mr. ESSADDEK in his role as Development Consultant for over a year, I testify to his remarkable competence, adaptability and quality of his relationships with clients. He also demonstrates exceptional professionalism in his contacts with his peers and in his collaboration with management. Constantly progressing professionally, Mohammed is always looking for relevant ways to ensure success in his work. He represents a definite asset for any organization. It is therefore with eagerness that I recommend him.
